babyDevelopment: Vocal cords are forming. The fetus is developing unique fingerprints. Intestines have moved from the umbilical cord into the stomach. Fine hair called lanugo might begin appearing on the skin.
bodyChanges: Welcome to the Second Trimester! Your energy levels should be returning. Your sex drive may increase as blood flow to the pelvic region grows. Heartburn may become more common as hormones relax the valve between the stomach and esophagus.
tips: Invest in comfortable underwear and bras
Start sleeping on your side to improve blood flow

do: Start sleeping on your left side
Use a pregnancy pillow for comfort
Eat smaller, more frequent meals to manage heartburn
dont: Sleep flat on your back for long periods

travelAdvisory.note: Safe to travel; walk and stretch frequently on long trips.

warningSignsToWatch: Sudden, extreme swelling of face or hands
Sharp pain on one side of abdomen
milestoneDescription: The risk of miscarriage is lower, and many early symptoms are fading.
